author: 0xb007ab1e <134006168+0xb007ab1e@users.noreply.github.com>
tooling: hand-authored; reachability assessed against tenantforge HTTP control-plane source

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-31789
vulnerability.description: OpenSSL heap buffer overflow on 32-bit systems from a large X.509 certificate

statements.impact_statement: The overflow is specific to 32-bit OpenSSL builds. The TenantForge image is published only for 64-bit platforms (linux/amd64, linux/arm64), where this code path is not present.
statements.action_statement: Re-evaluate if a 32-bit image variant is ever published. Superseded once the base image rebuilds with libssl3 >= 3.0.19-1~deb12u2.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-28387
vulnerability.description: OpenSSL use-after-free in DANE TLSA authentication

statements.impact_statement: TenantForge performs only standard outbound HTTPS/Postgres TLS via Node.js; it never enables or invokes DANE/TLSA certificate authentication, so the vulnerable code path is not executed.
statements.action_statement: Superseded once the base image rebuilds with libssl3 >= 3.0.19-1~deb12u2.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-28388
vulnerability.description: OpenSSL denial of service via NULL pointer dereference in delta CRL / CMS processing

statements.impact_statement: TenantForge does not process CMS messages; the only OpenSSL consumers are TLS client handshakes (Node https / pg) and HMAC/SHA hashing. The CMS code path is not executed.
statements.action_statement: Superseded once the base image rebuilds with libssl3 >= 3.0.19-1~deb12u2.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-28389
vulnerability.description: OpenSSL denial of service in CMS processing

statements.impact_statement: TenantForge does not process CMS messages; the CMS code path is not executed by the application's TLS-client + HMAC/SHA usage.
statements.action_statement: Superseded once the base image rebuilds with libssl3 >= 3.0.19-1~deb12u2.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-28390
vulnerability.description: OpenSSL denial of service via NULL pointer dereference in CMS

statements.impact_statement: TenantForge does not process CMS messages; the CMS code path is not executed.
statements.action_statement: Superseded once the base image rebuilds with libssl3 >= 3.0.19-1~deb12u2.

statements.impact_statement: TenantForge never calls PKCS7_verify(); it does not verify PKCS7/CMS signatures. Webhook authenticity uses HMAC-SHA, JWTs use jose (WebCrypto). The PKCS7 code path is not executed.
statements.action_statement: Superseded once the base image rebuilds with libssl3 >= 3.0.20-1~deb12u2.
